reviews.title: Nsave offers a smooth and user-friendly but ...
reviews.text:
Nsave offers a smooth and user-friendly interface, which makes account management and transactions quite intuitive. However, I’m giving it 3 stars due to issues with customer service. Recently, I experienced difficulties with withdrawals - funds were sometimes held or transfers took more than three business days to process. Additionally, I noticed inconsistencies in the USD to EGP exchange rate and the absence of a virtual card option in Egypt, which limits accessibility and convenience.
I truly hope Nsave will address these issues and improve its services, as the platform has great potential.

reviews.title: I am extremely frustrated with how this…
reviews.text:
I am extremely frustrated with how this matter is being handled.

I deposited $4,999 USD from my own personal Elevate account into my own personal nsave account for the purpose of using nsave’s investment feature. However, the transaction has been placed on hold, and the support response time has been extremely slow, with only one reply per day on weekdays.

First, I was asked to explain the purpose of the transaction, which I provided. Then I was asked to provide transaction proof from Elevate, which I also provided.

This is a self-deposit between two accounts under my own name. Despite that, the transaction is still being delayed.

Now I am being asked to explain how I originally received the funds in my Elevate account. I have already explained that the funds were accumulated over time from multiple legitimate sources, including invoice payments, Fiverr withdrawals, and other earnings. Now I am being asked to provide further details about my Fiverr earnings as well.

My question is simple: since this is a self-deposit, and I have already provided the relevant documents related to the transfer from Elevate, what exactly is causing the continued hold?

Elevate has provided documentation for the transaction, and I am cooperating fully. I would appreciate a clear explanation of what specific document or requirement is still outstanding, rather than repeated back-and-forth requests that continue to delay access to my own funds.

Please escalate this case and provide a clear update as soon as possible.
reviews.author: Muhammad Muzammil

reviews.title: Xperience
reviews.text: I am embarrassed to give them 1 star whole time and days I listened about them a reliable and trustworthy honest network of sending or receiving amounts without much paying back cost even I came from Pakistan is the main beginning after that much time and mental concentration diversion I am giving them opportunity that I will never mind for open my account and my mother will also give all details from Pakistan but they worked on my documentation submitted a week ago how they send an approval code to me for opening an account now they refuse because they are much busy then a customer waiting and waisted his time they are opening new accounts in new countries never checked my address documents before approval this work seems like a Pakistani worker concerns there tasks???
reviews.author: AZEEM NOOR

reviews.title: Funds stuck, contradictory support, and no clear resolution
reviews.text:
I made a small test 105 USDT deposit through nsave’s official web portal using the exact Ethereum wallet address and network generated by their system.

The blockchain transaction was completed successfully, and nsave detected the deposit inside my account, but it remained “In progress” and unavailable for far longer than the published processing time.

The support experience was extremely poor. I first received incorrect information claiming that only Solana was supported, even though their own portal had generated an Ethereum USDT wallet. After I provided proof, they admitted that I had followed the correct steps and promised that a specialist would contact me. No specialist contacted me, and the support conversation was later closed while the issue remained unresolved.

I then received conflicting explanations. One representative said there was a platform-wide pause affecting all USDT deposits, while another mentioned possible compliance checks, technical delays, and processing times of up to several business days. No one provided a clear diagnosis, complaint reference number, responsible processing partner, or firm resolution deadline.

The most concerning point is that nsave continued allowing customers to generate wallet addresses and make deposits despite allegedly having paused USDT processing. There was no warning before I transferred the funds.

Although they eventually confirmed that the funds were safe, leaving customer money inaccessible indefinitely without a clear timeline is unacceptable for a financial service. I had considered using nsave regularly, but this experience has completely damaged my trust in the platform.

reviews.author: Taim Kellizy

reviews.title: 46 Days Later, I'm Still Waiting for Answers About My Own Money
reviews.text:
My experience with Nsave has been deeply disappointing, not because my account was reviewed, but because of the way the review process has been handled.

My account was placed under review and I was asked to provide information regarding the source of funds and account activity. On 23 April 2026, I submitted every document and explanation requested by Nsave, including supporting bank statements, proof of ownership, and detailed explanations regarding the transactions under review.

After submitting the requested information, I received confirmation that my documents had been received and that my account was under review.

However, despite providing everything requested, I later received messages stating that the review was still awaiting my response. This was particularly concerning because the requested information had already been submitted weeks earlier.

Since then, I have opened multiple support tickets (#103522918, #100847884, and #91929960). Some of these tickets were marked as resolved, yet my account remained inaccessible and the review remained unresolved.

At the time of writing this review, more than 46 days have passed since I submitted all requested documentation. During this period, I have been unable to access more than USD 5,000 of my own funds while receiving little meaningful information about the status of the review or when it is expected to be completed.

More than six weeks after submitting all requested documentation, I am still unable to obtain clear answers to the most basic questions regarding my account and the status of the review:

* I have not been told whether my documents have actually been reviewed.

* I have not been informed whether any additional information is required.

* I have not been given a clear timeline for completion of the review.

* I have repeatedly received generic responses that do not address the specific questions being asked.

*I still do not know when I will regain access to more than $5,000 of my funds or what the exact resolution process will be if the account is not restored

A compliance review should not leave customers waiting for weeks without clear communication, meaningful updates, or a defined timeline.

The most frustrating part of this experience has not been the review itself, but the lack of transparency and accountability throughout the process.

I am not asking for special treatment. I am asking for something that every customer should reasonably expect: clear communication, accurate status updates, and a transparent resolution process.

I sincerely hope this review reaches someone within Nsave who is willing to review the case properly and provide the clarity that has been missing for more than six weeks.
reviews.author: MOHSIN SADIQ

reviews.title: missing funds…
reviews.text:
Extremely frustrating experience with Nsave. A payment sent to my account via Wise on 15 May 2026 is still missing. The sender confirmed the funds were successfully transferred and even provided transfer confirmations and trace details. Despite this, Nsave is unable to locate my funds. Support has been slow and unable to provide a clear explanation or resolution.
I have spent weeks chasing support without getting clear answers. Very disappointing experience.
reviews.author: Fatima Awan

reviews.title: Funds held for a week— still waiting for resolution
reviews.text:
---

1 star (updating as situation develops)

I received a $5,000 ACH payment from a US client on May 27, 2026. Six days later, funds are still held with no clear resolution.

I fully cooperated with every request — client agreement, invoice, bank statement, WhatsApp conversation, and complete payment reference details. Your app clearly shows the deposit. All documentation has been submitted and acknowledged by your team.

Yet responses continue to be generic, contradictory, and at times factually incorrect. Blaming a UK banking holiday for a delay on a domestic US-to-US ACH transfer is not a credible explanation and frankly undermines trust in your support team.

Multiple escalations have been promised. None have produced results.

I chose nsave for competitive rates and expected professional service. What I received instead is frozen funds and a runaround that is actively hurting my business.

I am keeping this review open and will update it once the matter is resolved. If nsave addresses this promptly and professionally, I am willing to revise my rating accordingly.

Hoping for a real resolution soon.
reviews.author: Ali Ahmad

reviews.title: Pathetic customer service, do not trust with payments larger than USD500
reviews.text:
Avoid nsave and choose better alternatives! They are currently holding $505 of my money in limbo since over 1.5 months, and have completely gone silent on all customer service fronts, be it through in-app support or the emails provided.

A domestic USD ACH transfer was delivered to my nsave on 14 April, but because my account was archived right around that date due to inactivity, their system glitched. nsave even issued me an official corporate letter explicitly admitting the $505 deposit was rejected and returned. 
However, the sender's bank confirmed on record that no return was ever executed. The funds are stuck in nsave's internal manual reconciliation ledger.
When I brought them this proof, a support rep emailed me promising their 'senior technical team' was fixing this as an 'absolute priority' within 48 hours. They completely missed their own deadline, ignored my extensions, and have vanished. Meanwhile, app agents just spam useless, copy-pasted scripts. Save yourself the nightmare and use a real bank.

reviews.title: Good, helpful and improving despite the bad reports
reviews.text: I know there are several reports of inadequacy and slow response times, I became doubtful from them. But so far, it has been 7 months now, and all I have experienced so far was quick response, easy transfers, and investment features. And they're constantly improving. Credit where credit's due, they're pretty good so far and hopefully they keep at it.

reviews.title: I made an account on nsave as it was on…
reviews.text:
I made an account on nsave as it was on hype here in Pakistan. Gave all the documents they requested. Got 200$ payment from clinet , then they started giving me 0.02 dollar daily.  Very good UI . easy to use.
I had to receive payment from another client. Client sent me 10$ just to test, and it worked. Then client sent 1060$, and it stuck. it took few days, and they started asking for a lot of proofs. I shared client communication via email, invoice, work details. But every 2nd day they were asking new and new details. I asked to refund money to client account . With this single msg, they blocked my ADH account, and said, "our partner disabled your account, and you cannot make new account as well. 

who is your partner?
we made account on your platform. we don't know your partner. 

they even disabled that support thread as well after that msg. Like a very short tempered friend who block you on whatsapp. 

Their support don't know what's going on . Client got notification that payment is processed and successful from his side, and payment is stuck in middle from last 20 days.

reviews.title: Adjust to Quick VIP.. #Better #Consistient
reviews.text: My overall impression of Nsave has been underwhelming. The platform appears limited in functionality, and certain features are not as intuitive or well-implemented as expected from a modern financial service. The onboarding process and account management can be unclear at times, which may create unnecessary friction for users trying to access or manage their funds efficiently. In addition, customer support responsiveness has been inconsistent when assistance is required. Overall, the service does not fully meet expectations in terms of usability, clarity, and reliability, and prospective users should evaluate it carefully before relying on it for regular use.
reviews.author: Jean Rix

reviews.title: I am extremely disappointed with…
reviews.text:
I am extremely disappointed with "Nsave" and their customer support.

My account was suddenly placed under review/frozen without any proper explanation. My client sent me 100 EUR on May 9th, and even after many days, the payment has still not been received or properly reflected.

I contacted support multiple times, but I am still not getting clear answers. At this point, this situation feels very unprofessional and honestly raises concerns about whether the platform is trustworthy.

I still do not know:

- Why my account was frozen
- Why my payment is delayed
- When my funds will be released
- What is happening with my existing balance and incoming payments

Keeping customer funds on hold for this long without transparency is unacceptable for a financial platform. If this issue is not resolved soon, many users may start believing this is fraudulent behavior.

I hope the Nsave team finally responds properly and resolves this matter immediately.
reviews.author: WAQAR CHAUDHaRY
reviews.replyText: Hi Waqar, we came across your review and we're truly sorry for the experience and lack of clear communication. Your funds are safe and accounted for. We'd like to resolve this with you directly: please reply to your existing support ticket referencing this review and our team will provide a full written explanation and next steps. We're on it. 🙏

reviews.title: worst experience with nsave its just more than a shit
reviews.text:
My experience with the Nsave app has been absolutely terrible. At first, everything seemed fine — I successfully received 3–4 payments without any issues. But suddenly, they started demanding unnecessary and unreasonable information about my customers, including full name, email, residency, nationality, and even ID cards.

Seriously? Who is going to provide an ID card just for a $30 or $40 transaction?

After that, things got even worse. I’ve been trying to resolve this with their support team for almost 2 months now, and their response time is pathetic. Sometimes they reply after 2 days, sometimes after 5 days — completely unprofessional.

I made one simple request: refund the money back to my customers. But even after 2 months, the funds are neither released to me nor returned to my customers.

Because of this, I have zero trust in this platform. This feels like a scam. I strongly advise everyone to stay away from Nsave — do not trust them with your money.
reviews.author: Umar Hayyat
reviews.replyText:
Hi Umar,

 Thank you for the review and we're very sorry for the frustration. We've located your account and the open compliance thread.

 The information requests you've received come from our partner bank's source-of-funds checks on incoming EUR wires from third parties — they're not unique to nsave, but we understand they feel disproportionate for small amounts and we should have explained the why much more clearly upfront. We also agree our response times on this thread have not been good enough.

 A senior member of our compliance team will pick up the conversation today and give you a clear, time-bound answer: which transactions we can release, which (if any) we genuinely need more information on, and where a refund to the sender is the right outcome. You can expect that update within 48 hours.

 Your funds are not lost and your account is not blocked, we'll work through every pending transaction with you until this is closed out. If anything is missed, please reply directly in the in-app chat referencing this Trustpilot review and we'll prioritise it.

 — The nsave team

Hello,

 Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We take claims like this seriously, but the review as written doesn't give us anything we can investigate — we couldn't locate any account, application, or support conversation tied to "Bicart Srl" on our side.

 If you have had a real experience with nsave that went wrong, we genuinely want to understand what happened and make it right. Please write to us at support@nsave.com with the email address you used to sign up (or any reference number from your case) and we will personally look into it.

 nsave is a fully regulated and licensed financial services provider, and every customer concern reaches a real person on our team. We're standing by to help.

 — The nsave team

reviews.author: Istiak Ahmed
reviews.replyText: Hi Istiak, thank you for the candid feedback  and we're sorry for the friction you've experienced. We can confirm the account changes you're referring to: your USD virtual account moved as part of a planned migration to a new banking partner (your wallet is now active and stable), and a separate ACH account request was unfortunately rejected at the address-verification step. We understand how disruptive multiple account changes can feel, and we don't take that lightly. Your current USD wallet is now your stable receiving account going forward no further changes are planned. If you'd like, please reach out to us at support@nsave.com  and we'll personally walk you through the new setup and resolve the ACH issue if you still want that account opened. We'd genuinely appreciate the chance to make this right.

reviews.title: I am very disappointed, Scammers
reviews.text:
I am very disappointed. I am facing 3 issues, none of them have been resolved, Worst bank I have ever used 

1) I tried to send money to my local bank account in Pakistan, but it has been a month and I have not received it. When I contacted them, there has been no response for the last two days. 

2) My friend sent money to my account as well, but that has also not been received. 

3) I ordered a card, and it is currently showing as "processing," but when I contacted them, they said the card is not available and that their team is working on it. 

To me, this company seems like a scam so far.
reviews.author: junaid amin
reviews.replyText:
Hi Junaid,

Thank you for taking the time to share this, and we're sorry it's been such a frustrating start with us. We've located your account and looked into all three issues you raised.

On the transfer to your Pakistani account: this $2 transfer has been stuck with our payout partner longer than it should have, and our team is escalating it now to get it released or refunded promptly. We'll follow up directly in your existing support thread today.

On the funds your friend sent: we've checked your account carefully and we can't see any incoming transfer matching that description. To help us trace it, could you share with our support team a screenshot or reference number from your friend's sending bank? That will let us confirm where the money currently sits.

On the card: you're right that the card creation didn't complete on our side. Our cards team is actively working on a fix and we'll reach out the moment your card is ready to be reissued.

Nsave is far from a scam, we’re a regulated platform and we take complaints like yours seriously. Please give us the chance to make this right. We've assigned someone to your case and will be in touch via the app shortly.

- The nsave team

reviews.title: I deposited like 1 month ago and my…

reviews.author: Sabbir Hasan
reviews.replyText:
Hi Sabbir,

 Thank you for taking the time to share your experience — and we're sorry it's been so frustrating. A deposit going missing for over a month is not the experience we want anyone to have, and we want to make this right.

 We've reviewed our records but we can't currently match your review to a confirmed deposit on our side, which suggests the funds may have been rejected before reaching your nsave account (often due to a minimum-threshold rule on the underlying network). Either way, you deserve a clear answer and resolution.

 Could you please email **support@nsave.com** with the subject line **"Trustpilot review – Sabbir"** and include:
 • The email address linked to your nsave account
 • The transaction hash / reference for your deposit
 • The sender wallet or bank details
 • The amount and approximate date

 Once we have those details, we'll trace the deposit end-to-end and get back to you within 1 business day with either a recovery path or a clear explanation. Your case will be handled directly by our senior support team.

 Thank you for your patience — we'd really like the chance to fix this for you.

 — The nsave team

 We appreciate the feedback and hope to resolve this with you privately.

reviews.title: Severe Lack of Stability, Support, and Trust in Service
reviews.text:
Last year, as an early user, I was genuinely excited about Nsave. It felt like a promising new fintech service that could bring real value. Initially, the ACH and card functionality worked reasonably well, and I had high expectations for what was coming next.

However, over time the experience has significantly declined. There is frequent switching of partners, sometimes every couple of days, which creates a clear lack of stability and consistency. On top of that, new accounts often have features disabled without any proper explanation or communication.

The support system is another major concern. Responses feel unstructured and unhelpful, and in many cases it seems like even the support team is unsure how to resolve issues. Instead of solutions, users are mostly just asked for repeated information.

The app itself is also very unstable for a fintech product. Basic reliability issues make day-to-day usage frustrating and unpredictable.

Another disappointing aspect is how feedback is handled. Even constructive criticism does not seem to be welcomed, and posts or comments are often not approved, despite active community participation and support from users like myself.

Most importantly, my ACH transfer has been stuck for the past 4–5 days. The only responses I’ve received are requests for information, with no real progress or resolution. This has been extremely frustrating and time-consuming.

As a result, I have withdrawn all my funds and do not plan to return anytime soon. Unfortunately, my trust in the service is completely gone.
reviews.author: Tanvir Ahassan

reviews.title: Money vanished. Support vanished. Don't fall for the "refunded" lie.
reviews.text:
I've been dealing with this mess for almost two months now and I'm genuinely at my wit's end. Writing this so hopefully someone else doesn't make the same mistake I did.

Everything was fine for a while. I was transferring money from my own checking account into Nsave, trying to build up a proper emergency fund. No problems, app worked, transfers went through. Then one day I opened the app and the money had vanished. Just completely gone from the screen. Account marked inactive. No email warning. No request for verification. Nothing. Just locked out of my own savings without a word.

I emailed support and got the same line everyone else seems to get. "Your account is under routine review. Please allow up to 30 days."

Okay. Fine. I waited the full 30 days. Crickets. I waited another two weeks and sent multiple follow-ups, each one ignored. Finally, after about six weeks of chasing them, I got one last email from support. They claimed they had "refunded all funds back to the original accounts."

Lie.

Here's why I know it's a lie. I funded this account with my own money from my own bank account. Transfers I initiated myself. If they actually sent the money back to the "original source," it would be sitting in my checking account right now. It's not. My bank sees nothing. No incoming transfer. No pending credit. No rejected deposit. The money vanished and it stayed vanished.

So now I'm stuck in limbo. They've washed their hands of it with a fake refund notice and stopped replying entirely. Meanwhile my savings are just floating somewhere or sitting in their account earning them interest while I get nothing.

If you're thinking about using Nsave for anything more than pocket change, don't. The second your balance looks like real money, they'll freeze you out, ignore you, and then lie about sending it back. Save yourself the stress and use a real bank.
reviews.author: imran uddin
reviews.replyText: Hi Imran, we understand your concern. Your account has been reviewed and is currently restricted. Your funds remain secure, and our team will contact you directly with the next steps regarding your account and balance.

reviews.title: Flawless experience for Bangladeshi Freelancers!
reviews.text:
I am extremely satisfied with nsave's service. I successfully linked my nsave USD account (via ClearBank) with my PayPal account. The transfer from PayPal to nsave was smooth and arrived within 24 hours.
​The best part is withdrawing funds to bKash in Bangladesh. Not only was the transfer fast, but I also received the 2.5% government incentive on the remittance, which is a huge plus. The transparency in fees and the competitive exchange rate make it a game-changer for international payments. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a reliable way to manage USD/EUR and send money home!

reviews.author: Anis

reviews.title: Funds received but no refund – very concerning experience
reviews.text:
Funds received but no refund – very concerning experience

I had a very frustrating experience with Nsave that I feel compelled to share.

On March 29, I made a USDC deposit (Solana network) to my account, and the transaction was successfully received on their side. Everything seemed fine at first.

However, after several back-and-forth exchanges with their support team, I was suddenly informed that Algeria is an unsupported country for their crypto services. This was never clearly communicated beforehand, and yet my deposit was accepted without any issue.

They then stated that my funds would be refunded to my Binance account. The problem is that, as of today, I have received no proof that this refund has actually been initiated.

No transaction hash (TXID), no confirmation date, no destination wallet address — nothing.

This is extremely concerning. Holding customer funds without providing verifiable proof of a refund is not acceptable, especially in the crypto space where transparency is essential.

At this point, I am still waiting for:

- A valid TXID of the refund transaction
- Confirmation of when the refund was sent
- The wallet address used for the transfer

Until this is provided, I cannot consider this issue resolved.

I strongly advise others to be cautious, especially if you are located in a country that may not be supported. Accepting deposits and then refusing service afterward creates serious trust issues.

I hope Nsave resolves this quickly and provides the necessary proof.
reviews.author: allaeddine aiche
reviews.replyText:
Hi AllaEddine, thank you for sharing your experience — we completely understand why you felt compelled to.
We want to confirm that your funds have been fully recovered and credited to your nsave account. We acknowledge that this took longer than it should have, and that the experience was frustrating and stressful. We take full responsibility for that.
Your case helped us identify a gap in how we communicated with you throughout the process, and we've taken note. We're glad the matter is now resolved and hope to restore your trust in nsave going forward.
If you have any further questions, please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly. 🙏

Dear Customer,

We regret to learn about your experience, as this does not reflect the standard of service we strive to provide.
Verification processes may occasionally require additional time due to further checks; however, you should always receive clear and timely updates from us. The situation you have described is unacceptable, and we fully understand your frustration.
We would like to review your case in detail to resolve this matter appropriately. Please contact us at support@nsave.com using the email address associated with your account, or provide your registered email here so that we may locate your profile.
If there have been any delays or missed follow-ups, we will ensure these are addressed, including a review of any charges applied.

We appreciate you bringing this to our attention and hope to improve your experience.

Sincerely,  
nsave Support

reviews.title: Very Poor Experience with nsave – 4 Weeks Without a Clear Resolution
reviews.text:
My experience with nsave has been extremely frustrating and disappointing.

My issue began on 4 March 2026, and my account has now been under review for 4 weeks following an incoming transfer of £1,500. I provided all requested documents and explanations promptly and fully cooperated from the beginning. Despite this, I have still not received any meaningful update, clear decision, or proper timeline for resolution.

The most disappointing part is not the review itself, but the way the case has been handled. My account remains inactive and inaccessible, and I have repeatedly received generic, repetitive responses instead of any substantive communication. After weeks of waiting, I am still left without clarity on whether my account will be reactivated or permanently closed, and without a clear timeline for what will happen to my funds.

I understand that compliance checks may be necessary. However, keeping a customer’s account restricted for this long, while providing no meaningful update and no transparent resolution path, is simply unacceptable.

At this stage, this has become a very poor customer experience and has caused significant stress and frustration.

For privacy reasons, I am not sharing my full account details publicly, but I am happy to provide them directly if the company genuinely intends to investigate and resolve this matter.

UPDATE:
I have submitted a formal complaint and also contacted the Financial Ombudsman Service. They replied and confirmed that I must wait until 8 weeks have passed from the date of my formal complaint, or until I receive a final response, before I can formally submit the case with supporting documents.

Despite this ongoing process, my account remains inactive, I still have no clear decision, and I have not been given any proper timeline for resolution. This continued lack of transparency and meaningful communication is extremely disappointing.
reviews.author: GAMAL GUDA

reviews.title: Update. SCAM!!!
reviews.text:

I have tried to open a business account, registered in the UK. Before opening the account they charged me $10 as on-boarding fee. Now it is 10 days, no updates from there, tried email, whatsapp but no communication. Beware.

Once we have that, we’ll investigate your case right away.

Thank you for your patience.

reviews.title: Worst fintech experience – hidden traps and useless card
reviews.text:
I tested nsave with a small amount and it turned into a complete waste of money.

I deposited around 10 USD and only about 6 USD actually showed up in my account after their fees and conversions.

Then I made another USDT (TRC20) deposit of 2.8102 USDT. Only after sending it, I discovered that they have a 5.2 USDT minimum. Instead of crediting it or refunding it, they simply told me that deposits below the minimum are “discarded” by their payment partner and cannot be refunded or manually credited. So that money is just gone.

Their Visa card is also practically useless for me. I tried to use it for normal online payments (ChatGPT, Google, subscriptions, etc.) and it keeps failing, so the card is just sitting there while I’ve wasted money on verification, deposits and tests.
Overall, this feels like a terrible user experience and extremely unfriendly policies for small users. Losing funds because of a hidden minimum and then being told nothing can be done is unacceptable. I will not be using nsave again and I do not recommend it to anyone who wants a reliable, transparent fintech solution.

I was meant to receive 3 months of my salary in the nsave account but the ACH failed. After contacting support every agent provided different solutions, then they started asking for confirmation. The confirmation process took weeks and then nsave support said that this transfer cannot be processed. Now they are holding on to that money and refusing to refund. They have asked for a ton of verifications, all sorts of information about my client, and I have provided all the documents, but they are still refusing to refund. I can no longer send a msg to their support since they have turned off that option in my app, and they are only communicating via email, they take days to respond on email. All of this seems deliberate, and now when I looked up I am seeing this same complain by a lot of other people on reddit and other forums as well.

STAY AWAY FROM NSAVE, THIS COMPANY IS A SCAM!!!

reviews.title: They Stall People Money
reviews.text:
I am writing this review to share my extremely frustrating and disappointing experience with Nsave. They are currently holding $3,900 of my hard-earned money, and despite me providing every required document, they are refusing to release the funds or return them to the original payment source.

The payment was sent via PayPal to ACH, the same method I have used many times before without any issues. All previous transfers went through smoothly. But the moment the amount was slightly larger, Nsave immediately stalled the transfer and began demanding an unreasonable amount of private information.

I submitted all documents they requested, yet they kept asking for more including bank details from the sender, even though the payment originated from PayPal, not directly from a bank account. My sender (client) has rightfully refused to provide those personal banking details because:

She already paid through PayPal,

It is not her responsibility to give private bank information to a third-party company, and

Nsave should simply return the money to PayPal if they cannot release it.

Instead of doing the logical and correct thing refunding the payment back to PayPal, the platform it originated from Nsave continues to insist on obtaining information they have no right to request.

To make the situation even worse, Nsave has closed my ACH account without resolving the issue, and they still keep repeating the same message: provide sender bank details or they won’t proceed. This is impossible because the sender paid through PayPal, not from a bank directly.

At this point, it feels like Nsave is holding my money hostage. I have been cooperative, transparent, and patient, yet they refuse to release the funds or refund them to PayPal. Their actions have caused unnecessary stress, delays, and financial inconvenience.

My experience shows that while Nsave might handle small transactions smoothly, they completely fail when dealing with larger amounts. Their lack of transparency, unreasonable data requests, and refusal to send the money back to PayPal is extremely alarming.

I am deeply disappointed and would strongly caution others before using Nsave. This experience has destroyed my trust in their service.

reviews.title: My honest experience with Nsave: Great potential, nightmare compliance
reviews.text:
Nsave seemed like a service with massive potential, but I am forced to say, their compliance team is the WORST I have seen in any Fintech company to date.

Recently, a service I was using decided to switch to "Payoneer-style" pricing (charging 1% for outgoing ACH instead of a flat $2 fee). Naturally, I was looking for a better option to store the USD funds I am saving for my higher studies. I decided to give Nsave a shot, but the moment I made the transaction, I received an email with the subject "Required Documents" and my funds have now been stuck for more than 10 days.

The level of scrutiny is absurd. They asked for my employer contract, bank statement, Upwork statement, and previous fintech statements from Wise, Elevate Pay, and the other service. So far, there have been a total of 40 emails back and forth. They don't reply for hours and on the weekends, and I have to pressure them just to get a response. Even then, the only answer I get is "it has been provided to the partner bank" or they ask for additional documents to prove something I have already explained and provided multiple times.

I was really hoping Nsave would provide better service, given how much they claim to do for the community, but I was proven very wrong. I hope no one else gets treated like a criminal who has to prove they are earning income by fair means over and over again, just to move their own money.

I genuinely hope Nsave looks into resolving these issues, specifically their communication strategy and customer-facing agents. Right now, the support behaves like traditional government bank employees: having no clue what they actually need and seemingly wanting to make the client suffer.
reviews.author: Jubayer Abdullah Joy

reviews.title: Excellent Service and Fast Support
reviews.text:
I recently opened my Nsave account and the experience has been excellent so far. The onboarding was smooth, verification was quick, and when I had a small issue, the support team solved it instantly after I resubmitted my information. What impressed me most was the professionalism of the help chat — clear, polite, and efficient.  
> I feel confident using Nsave as a reliable solution for managing my money. Highly recommended.
reviews.author: khecha nassim

reviews.text: Love nsave, they actually care about their customers. Their service is amazing, and I really support what they’re doing.

reviews.title: Incredible experience with nsave.
reviews.text:
Incredible experience with nsave.

I’ve been using nsave for a while now, and it’s honestly one of the most intuitive and reliable financial apps I’ve tried. The interface feels clean and modern, everything loads fast, and the team is constantly improving the product.

You can tell the team behind nsave genuinely cares about building a trustworthy and user-friendly product. It’s not just another fintech app it’s a financial companion that feels built for the modern world.

Highly recommend it to anyone who values simplicity, speed, and peace of mind with their money.
reviews.author: Peter Zynkle

reviews.title: I started using Nsave because my local…
reviews.text: I started using Nsave because my local banking options were unstable and expensive. Opening an account was straightforward, and I felt reassured knowing my money could be stored in strong currencies like USD and EUR. Their support team is unlike anyone else in the world — they go above and beyond, and you can feel they truly care in everything they do.

reviews.title: I withdrew from PayPal 7 days ago
reviews.text: I withdrew from PayPal 7 days ago, and it still hasn't arrived in my account. PayPal says it's complete. This is a very disappointing service and slow service. They are completely unreliable.
reviews.author: Md Arifuzzaman

reviews.title: Honest review about Nsave
reviews.text:
I started using Nsave two months ago. Opening an account was very easy, and sending or receiving money is very smooth. In Bangladesh this app would be the game changer because we don’t have access to apps like Wise, PayPal or Revolut, etc. Although the fees seem a bit high to me (I am not used to using this type of fintech platform). They have a Facebook group; whether it’s official or not, I don’t know, but there is a guy from NSAVE who helps to solve the issues.

Cons
—It's not a bank, so there is no fund protection. 

—The customer support is very poor; like, I needed to contact them two times, and I have to wait more than 2 days just to talk with them. 

—I heard many bad experiences, like customers' funds going frozen or vanishing in the App Store or in Trustpilot, but I am using it smoothly and didn’t find any fund-related issues.
reviews.author: Omer kaif Akash

reviews.title: I have a terrible experience,
reviews.text:
I have a terrible experience,
First of all, i found my self subscribed to a 10$ monthly subscription that i didn't ask for but i neglected it, the worst part is i can not access my account nor my money since 2 weeks, and no one is even replying from the support to tell me what's happening and why is the hold on my account, no response on WhatsApp or any social media or even inside app support. That's totally inappropriate and i will raise a legal issue against Nsave if my problem is not solved in the next few days.
And will definitely spread this experience on social media.
reviews.author: Ahmed Khattab

reviews.title: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5/5 — Exceptionally Supportive Team and Seamless Transfers
reviews.text:
As a freelancer handling regular international payments, I’ve had the opportunity to use several financial services—but Nsave stands out in a truly meaningful way.

From day one, their platform has been intuitive and user-friendly. Transferring funds, especially from USD to a Bangladeshi bank account, has never been this smooth for me. What truly impressed me, though, was the exceptional support team. Every time I had a question or faced a challenge, a real human agent responded with care, clarity, and patience—something that's rare these days.

They go beyond just offering a service; they treat you like a valued customer and show genuine interest in resolving your issue. Even when things got complex, the team handled everything with empathy and efficiency, ensuring clear communication at every step.

If you're a freelancer or international worker looking for a reliable, transparent, and customer-first financial platform, I can confidently recommend Nsave. Their dedication to building trust and helping users feel secure is what makes them truly special.

Thank you to the whole Nsave team — especially Paola and Mira — for consistently providing support that goes above and beyond.
reviews.author: NIAZ AHMAD

reviews.title: Excellent Service – Reliable and User-Friendly
reviews.text:
I’ve had a great experience with Nsave so far. The platform is easy to use, and setting up my account was straightforward and quick. I appreciate the transparency and the secure feeling I get while using their services. Customer support is responsive and helpful whenever I have questions.

It's clear that Nsave is committed to providing a safe and efficient financial solution, especially for people who may face challenges with traditional banking options. I highly recommend Nsave for anyone looking for a trustworthy and modern alternative.
